note: Frozen semantic color action vocabulary. VLM / student model may only SELECT an action id per region; it never writes free-form parameters or prompts. Each action binds two execution templates: local_params (for the Python/C++ renderer) and gpt_prompt_fragment (for GPT Image 2). local_params are applied WITHIN the region mask (feathered) unless object is 'global'. All numeric params are the value at strength=1.0 and are linearly scaled by the plan's strength.

white_balance_correct.summary: Neutralize global color cast (gray-world / cast proxy driven).
white_balance_correct.gpt_prompt_fragment: Correct the overall white balance to neutral, removing color casts, without changing subject identity or object colors.

exposure_lift.gpt_prompt_fragment: Gently lift overall exposure to open up midtones while protecting highlights.

exposure_reduce.summary: Reduce global exposure / recover blown highlights by tone only.
exposure_reduce.gpt_prompt_fragment: Gently reduce overall exposure to restore highlight balance.

contrast_soften.gpt_prompt_fragment: Soften global contrast slightly for a gentler tonal range.

contrast_boost.gpt_prompt_fragment: Add gentle global contrast for a cleaner look without crushing shadows.

latitude_recovery.summary: Recover highlight/shadow detail beyond original latitude. GPT Image 2 only.
latitude_recovery.gpt_prompt_fragment: Recover highlight and shadow detail naturally, as if the photo was shot with higher dynamic range, without halos, artificial HDR look, or over-sharpening.

clarity_boost.summary: Improve perceived sharpness / micro-contrast. GPT Image 2 only.
clarity_boost.gpt_prompt_fragment: Improve overall clarity and micro-contrast without halos or over-sharpening, keeping a natural photographic look.

slight_clean.summary: Slightly clean a dull/hazy sky toward a believable blue-gray.
slight_clean.gpt_prompt_fragment: Only gently clean the sky toward a believable daylight blue-gray. Preserve clouds, tree edges, buildings, and horizon.

natural_daylight_blue.summary: Turn a dull gray daytime sky into natural daylight blue.
natural_daylight_blue.gpt_prompt_fragment: Only adjust the sky region. Make the sky a natural daylight blue with realistic brightness and soft saturation. Preserve cloud shape, building edges, trees, horizon, and the original lighting direction.

deep_blue.summary: Deeper commercial blue sky (higher risk of looking fake).
deep_blue.gpt_prompt_fragment: Only adjust the sky region toward a deeper, clean commercial blue with realistic gradient. Preserve clouds, edges, horizon, and lighting direction. Avoid neon or fake HDR blue.

keep_overcast_mood.summary: Keep the overcast documentary mood; only remove haze.
keep_overcast_mood.gpt_prompt_fragment: Keep the overcast mood of the sky. Do not make it blue; only reduce haze slightly.

keep_sunset.summary: Preserve sunset color; never force blue.
keep_sunset.gpt_prompt_fragment: Preserve the sunset colors of the sky. Do not neutralize or make it blue.

keep_night.summary: Preserve night sky; never force blue.
keep_night.gpt_prompt_fragment: Preserve the night sky. Do not brighten into daylight or make it blue.

remove_yellow_green_cast.summary: Gently remove yellow-green pollution from skin.
remove_yellow_green_cast.gpt_prompt_fragment: Correct yellow-green color pollution on skin gently while preserving natural skin texture, identity, pores, and age.

remove_red_orange_cast.gpt_prompt_fragment: Reduce oversaturated red-orange on skin while preserving identity and texture.

clean_natural.gpt_prompt_fragment: Make skin a clean natural tone, preserving identity, texture, pores, and age. Avoid plastic skin.

warm_healthy.gpt_prompt_fragment: Give skin a warm, healthy tone while preserving identity and texture. Avoid orange or plastic skin.

fresh_natural_green.gpt_prompt_fragment: Make grass and trees a fresh natural green, keeping local texture. Avoid neon green.

reduce_yellow_cast.gpt_prompt_fragment: Reduce yellow cast on grass and trees toward a healthy green, keeping texture.

darker_cinematic_green.gpt_prompt_fragment: Shift grass and trees toward a darker cinematic green while keeping texture.

cleaner_blue_cyan.summary: Cleaner blue/cyan water when scene supports it.
cleaner_blue_cyan.gpt_prompt_fragment: Shift water toward a cleaner blue-cyan while preserving reflections and wave texture.

keep.gpt_prompt_fragment: Preserve clothing design and brand colors exactly.

neutralize_white.summary: Neutralize a color cast on white clothing only.
neutralize_white.gpt_prompt_fragment: Neutralize the color cast on white clothing only, without changing other clothing colors or brand colors.

keep.gpt_prompt_fragment: Preserve the stage and LED screen colors and atmosphere. Do not neutralize them.

reduce_face_color_pollution.summary: Reduce colored-light pollution on faces only, keep stage color.
reduce_face_color_pollution.gpt_prompt_fragment: Reduce colored stage-light pollution on faces only while preserving the stage and LED atmosphere elsewhere.

warm_appetizing.gpt_prompt_fragment: Give food a warm appetizing color. Avoid gray, dull, or overly cool tones.
